summary: The concept of a "globulomaxillary cyst" does not correspond to any recognized pathology in current medical knowledge. Anatomic inconsistencies—linking the orbit (eye-globe) with the maxilla (upper jaw)—and complete lack of documentation across peer-reviewed journals render its existence medically implausible and unsupported.

Answer choice: B
